definition: A block is a UI component with integrated business logic — server actions, validation, tenant scoping. Beyond shadcn/ui blocks.

blocks.name: data-table
blocks.purpose: Generic data table with sorting/filtering/pagination/selection, nuqs URL state, Prisma filters

blocks.name: auth-flow
blocks.purpose: Login + register + forgot-password + reset + verify, tenant-aware

blocks.name: billing-portal
blocks.purpose: Stripe customer portal integration — invoice list, payment methods, plan switch

blocks.name: admission-flow
blocks.purpose: Multi-step student admission with file upload, OTP, status chain (King Fahad pilot block)

_note: 4 production blocks. Adding a 5th requires captain approval (high reuse threshold).
_followUp: When admission ships to King Fahad, promote learnings into a `pilot-onboarding` block for repeated school onboarding.
